questions.stem: You need to view historical CPU usage trends for spine-01 over the last 24 hours. Which interface should you use?
You run `kubectl describe vpc test-vpc` and see: `Warning  ReconcileFailed  2m  fabricator  Subnet 10.10.10.0/24 overlaps with existing VPC 'prod-vpc'`. What does this mean?

options.text: The VPC is being deployed normally (this warning is expected)
The VPC configuration has an error that must be fixed
The VPC is waiting for switches to become available
The Fabricator controller needs to be restarted

questions.stem: Your manager asks: "When was the production-vpc modified and by whom?" Which Gitea feature should you use?
You suspect a switch is dropping packets due to a bad cable or transceiver. Which Grafana dashboard is MOST useful?
A VPC appears to be configured correctly in Gitea, but servers aren't receiving DHCP addresses. What should you check NEXT?

options.text: Recreate the VPC configuration file in Gitea
Use kubectl to verify the VPC was deployed and check for error events

questions.stem: Grafana shows spine-01 as 'Down'. What should you do FIRST?

options.text: Check kubectl for spine-01 Agent status and events
